description: The default promotion-run outcome: Tier 1 PASS, Tier 2 GREEN, behavioral eval NOT requested (Tier 3 SKIPPED by opt-out, not by fail-fast). Clears the static bar; behavioral eval not performed -> final PASS. A SKIPPED behavioral tier caps the run at PASS (never VERIFIED).
why: § 6 R8 (t1=PASS AND t2 ∈ {GREEN,YELLOW} AND t3=SKIPPED) + § 9 R16 (SKIPPED caps at PASS). Row (PASS, GREEN|YELLOW, SKIPPED) -> PASS.
